clues: Remote desktop connections through a load balancer are being disconnected after a few minutes.
Reconnecting to the remote desktop session works but disconnects again after the same interval.
The RDP session is being handled by a network load balancer.
The load balancer's idle timeout setting is shorter than the RDP session idle threshold.
The load balancer terminates the connection when no data is exchanged within the timeout period.
